required_fields.label: Type of contract
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Master Services Agreement, NDA, License Agreement

required_fields.label: Scope of the agreement
required_fields.placeholder: Describe what goods, services, or rights are covered by this contract...

required_fields.label: Contract term
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., 12 months with auto-renewal, 3-year fixed term

optional_fields.label: Compensation / payment terms
optional_fields.placeholder: Describe pricing, payment schedule, invoicing terms...

optional_fields.label: Termination conditions
optional_fields.placeholder: Any specific termination triggers beyond standard breach...

optional_fields.label: Intellectual property ownership
optional_fields.placeholder: Who owns work product, pre-existing IP provisions...

optional_fields.label: Non-compete / non-solicitation terms
optional_fields.placeholder: Duration and geographic scope of any restrictive covenants...

optional_fields.label: Insurance requirements
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., $1M general liability, E&O coverage required

optional_fields.label: Special provisions or carve-outs
optional_fields.placeholder: Any unique terms this contract needs to include...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload any existing contracts, term sheets, or prior agreements for reference
Upload firm or company letterhead / brand guidelines (optional)

sections.label: Recitals
sections.instructions: State the background and purpose of the agreement using standard WHEREAS recitals. Establish the relationship between the parties.

sections.label: Definitions
sections.instructions: Define all capitalized terms used throughout the agreement. Include standard definitions for Agreement, Confidential Information, Deliverables, Effective Date, and Term.

sections.label: Scope of Work / Services
sections.instructions: Detail the services, goods, or rights being provided. Be specific enough to prevent scope disputes.

sections.label: Term and Termination
sections.instructions: Specify the contract duration, renewal provisions, and termination rights for each party including cure periods.

sections.label: Compensation and Payment
sections.instructions: Detail all pricing, payment schedules, invoicing procedures, late payment penalties, and expense reimbursement terms.

sections.label: Intellectual Property
sections.instructions: Specify ownership of work product, licenses granted, pre-existing IP protections, and assignment provisions.

sections.label: Confidentiality
sections.instructions: Define confidential information, obligations of the receiving party, exclusions, and survival period.

sections.label: Representations and Warranties
sections.instructions: Include standard representations for authority, compliance with laws, and non-infringement. Add deal-specific warranties.

sections.label: Indemnification
sections.instructions: Specify mutual or asymmetric indemnification obligations, procedures for claims, and defense obligations.

sections.label: Limitation of Liability
sections.instructions: Set liability caps, exclude consequential damages, and specify any carve-outs from the limitation.

sections.label: Dispute Resolution
sections.instructions: Specify the dispute resolution mechanism: negotiation, mediation, arbitration, or litigation. Include venue and governing law.

sections.label: General Provisions
sections.instructions: Include standard boilerplate: entire agreement, amendment, assignment, notices, severability, waiver, force majeure, counterparts.

sections.label: Signature Block
sections.instructions: Format signature blocks for all parties with name, title, date, and entity name fields.

sections.label: Exhibits and Schedules
sections.instructions: Include any referenced exhibits such as detailed SOW, pricing schedule, SLA, or data processing addendum.
